name: 2026-05-22 Political Commentary Missing Sabungeros TH
description:
34 men went missing. Only 5 families still show up in court.

Most who stopped, police were told, were put on a P40,000 monthly payroll to skip the hearings. The officers meant to protect the case got caught meeting the accused.

Justice here is not collapsing on its own. It is being switched off, one paid family at a time.

Binili ang katahimikan.

Most who stopped, police were told, were put on a P40,000 monthly payroll to skip the hearings. The officers meant to protect the case got caught meeting the accused.

Justice here is not collapsing on its own. It is being switched off, one paid family at a time.

Binili ang katahimikan.

34 men went missing. Only 5 families still show up in court.

Most who stopped, police were told, were put on a P40,000 monthly payroll to skip the hearings. The officers meant to protect the case got caught meeting the accused.

Justice here is not collapsing on its own. It is being switched off, one paid family at a time.

Binili ang katahimikan.

Missing sabungeros case: 2 PNP officers relieved May 20, 2026 for alleged interference (facilitating meetings between complainant families and detained/dismissed officers); families told the NPC that complainants were on a P40,000/month payroll to skip hearings and drop cases (amount disputed by accused's counsel). Sources: Manila Times (May 20/21/22), GMA News, Inquirer, Manila Bulletin, Philstar editorial (May 23).
